acceptance.assertion: grabowski_task_list and grabowski_current_work can project the current persistent task store without raising 'effect plan entry fields are not exact' or LifecycleProjectionIntegrityError on valid stored records.

The exact incompatible effect-plan record shape is identified and handled through a versioned compatibility, migration or validation path that fails closed on genuinely malformed records without discarding or rewriting unrelated persistent task history.

Schema and projection regression tests cover the observed incompatible record, current canonical records and malformed inputs; post-deploy live readback proves both task listing and current-work projection on the real store.

approval.note: Registered from repeated live T045 closeout failures on 2026-07-23. The global task-list/current-work projection currently raises 'effect plan entry fields are not exact'. The failed reads were not treated as task truth and the user requires useful unfixed operator work to be registered rather than left as prose.

goal: Restore fail-closed but usable Grabowski task-store projection by reconciling the observed effect-plan schema incompatibility without losing persistent task history or weakening malformed-record detection.

does_not_establish: that underlying task records are lost
permission to delete incompatible persistent records
permission to relax exact-schema validation globally
metadata.observed_error: effect plan entry fields are not exact

rollback.strategy: Revert the projection compatibility or migration change while preserving the original persistent task records and diagnostic evidence. No task history may be deleted as rollback.

title: Repair Grabowski task projection effect-plan contract
